From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This article is about the album by Sonny Phillips. For the album by Waylon Jennings, see [Black on Black](/wiki/Black_on_Black "Black on Black"). For the tribute album to the American hardcore punk band Black Flag, see [Black on Black: A Tribute to Black Flag](/wiki/Black_on_Black:_A_Tribute_to_Black_Flag "Black on Black: A Tribute to Black Flag"). For the song of the American rock band Heart, see [Desire Walks On](/wiki/Desire_Walks_On "Desire Walks On").

1970 studio album by Sonny Phillips

| Black on Black! | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |

| Recorded | July 27, 1970 |

| [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[Black Magic](/w/index.php?title=Black_Magic_(Sonny_Phillips_album)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Black Magic (Sonny Phillips album) (page does not exist)")* (1970) | ***Black on Black!*** (1970) | *[My Black Flower](/w/index.php?title=My_Black_Flower&action=edit&redlink=1 "My Black Flower (page does not exist)")* (1976) | | |

***Black on Black!*** is the third album by jazz organist [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips"), which was recorded in 1970 and released on the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Black_on_Black!&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarStarStarHalf star[[2]](#cite_note-Allmusic-2) |

Stewart Mason of [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") stated, "Sonny Phillips' third and final album for Prestige, coming just over a year after his first, shows the soul-jazz organist moving in a somewhat funkier direction than his first two efforts. The roiling title track actually has an edge of menace to it, an idea his other albums never even entertained".[[2]](#cite_note-Allmusic-2)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Black_on_Black!&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

All compositions by Sonny Phillips except where noted.

1. "Black on Black" (Rusty Bryant, Sonny Phillips, Melvin Sparks, Jimmy Lewis, Bernard Purdie) – 5:30
2. "Check It Out" (Sonny Phillips) – 6:16
3. "Blues in Maude's Flat" ([Grant Green](/wiki/Grant_Green "Grant Green")) – 6:25
4. "[Proud Mary](/wiki/Proud_Mary "Proud Mary")" ([John Fogerty](/wiki/John_Fogerty "John Fogerty")) – 7:55
5. "The Doll House" (Jimmy Lewis) – 7:32

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Black_on_Black!&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") – [organ](/wiki/Hammond_organ "Hammond organ")
* [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant") – [alto saxophone](/wiki/Alto_saxophone "Alto saxophone"), [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone")
* [Melvin Sparks](/wiki/Melvin_Sparks "Melvin Sparks") – [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* [Jimmy Lewis](/wiki/Jimmy_Lewis_(bassist) "Jimmy Lewis (bassist)") – [electric bass](/wiki/Electric_bass "Electric bass")
* [Bernard Purdie](/wiki/Bernard_Purdie "Bernard Purdie") – [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
